findings.title: Hardcoded public IP address
findings.detail: Source hardcodes public IP 8.8.8.8. Verify it is not an exfiltration destination.

findings.title: Spawns child processes
findings.detail: Spawns child processes in src/index.ts. Confirm this is disclosed by the server's tool descriptions.

findings.title: Executes shell commands
findings.detail: Executes shell commands in src/index.ts. Confirm this is disclosed by the server's tool descriptions.

findings.title: Decoded data flows into code execution
findings.detail: src/index.ts decodes base64 and appears to execute it — a classic obfuscated-payload pattern.
